description: Experience the convenience of getting your favorite meals delivered right at your doorstep with our two-column, light-themed email template. Designed with a lively touch of white and orange, this template is perfect for promoting your food delivery app. The handwritten style adds a personal touch, making it more appealing to your audience. Encourage your customers to download your app and explore a wide variety of food and beverage options. With this template, you can effectively showcase your app's features and highlight the benefits of using your food delivery service. This template is an excellent choice for businesses in the product promotion, food and beverage, and apps & downloads sectors. Make your email marketing campaign more appetizing and engaging with our tastefully designed template.
short_description: Promote your food delivery app with our two-column, light-themed email template. With a mix of white and orange, and a handwritten style, it's perfect for showcasing food and beverage options. Ideal for product promotion and app downloads.

designer.description:
My name is Andrea Dall'Ara and I'm a freelancer digital graphic designer.
I'm focused on UI design for websites, emails and applications, logo and icon design and digital illustration.
